about.label: About me
about.title: About me – Herman Añez
about.introDescription: I am a Computer Engineer with over 12 years of experience in software architecture and distributed systems. I specialize in DDD (Domain Driven Developmen), Clean Architecture, and event-driven systems, always keeping a strong focus on scalability, Zero Trust security, and technical leadership. I have had the opportunity to lead teams and transform business requirements into efficient technical solutions.

achievements: Led the technical evolution of critical applications, progressing from junior developer to technical lead.
Acted as a direct liaison with clients, transforming business requirements into technical specifications.
Implemented best practices that ensured scalability, quality, and adherence to critical deadlines.
Coordinated with design and product teams for efficient feature integration.
High-Performance System Design: Designed and implemented a specialized system for the massive generation of digital media (NFTs).
Optimized parallel processing workflows to handle massive volumes of data.
Full Stack developer on the assistance project.
Team Lead on the exam delivery and assistance Q&A project.
Tutor for the courses: Mathematics 1&2, Calculus 1&2, Physics 1, Discrete Mathematics, Programming 1,2,3.

technicalSkills.title: Architecture & Leadership
technicalSkills.description: DDD, Hexagonal Architecture, Microservices, Outbox Pattern, C4 Model. Stakeholder management, technical mentoring, agile methodologies.

technicalSkills.title: Security and Data
technicalSkills.description: OAuth2/JWT, mTLS, PostgreSQL (RLS), MongoDB, Redis, Supabase, PocketBase.
